name: synalum-pkm
description: Synalum — Synergy Alumni & Mahasiswa (PKM USK). One-command local dev runner.

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" --prefix "[{name}]" --names "API,CLIENT" "npm run dev --prefix synalum-api" "npm run dev --prefix synalum-client"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix synalum-api && npm install --prefix synalum-client
